## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Problem or opportunity

What gap does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the improvement you want to see.

## Scope notes

Please keep suggestions aligned with the repository's role as a tutorial-based learning project with trainer attribution preserved.

## Additional context

Add references, examples, or notes if useful.
